name: Libeth, Fontaine
description: Libeth is still the same quiet young woman of unquestionable refinement and personality. Although an Aggie only a year, she has won a host of friends. One of the beauties chosen for the Beauty Section of the '24 Mule Rider.
text: Libeth is still the same quiet young woman of unquestionable refinement and personality. Although an Aggie only a year, she has won a host of friends. One of the beauties chosen for the Beauty Section of the '24 Mule Rider.

name: Hugh, Mcnees
description: Hugh rightfully deserves his reputation of being the most studious. His supply of midnight oil is inexhaustible. He's most intellectual, even though he has spent five years of constant study at Old Aggie.
text: Hugh rightfully deserves his reputation of being the most studious. His supply of midnight oil is inexhaustible. He's most intellectual, even though he has spent five years of constant study at Old Aggie.

name: Irene, Pittman
description: Here's to "Rene," whose avoirdupois is "teenie weenie!" She sews, and sings, and reads, and cooks. What else could she do but smile?
text: Here's to "Rene," whose avoirdupois is "teenie weenie!" She sews, and sings, and reads, and cooks. What else could she do but smile?

name: Janie Lou, Hudson
description: Janie Lou is one of our biggest college students, both in weight and heart.
text: Janie Lou is one of our biggest college students, both in weight and heart.

name: Arnold, Rubye
description: What do you think? Ruby has fast acquired the old Aggie spirit. Here's proof she will be a typical college girl of '25.
text: What do you think? Ruby has fast acquired the old Aggie spirit. Here's proof she will be a typical college girl of '25.

name: Arnold, Hazel
description: She is not any lad's belle, nor any professor's pet. But we extend a vote of thanks to the Year '24 for giving us such a lady as Hazel.
text: She is not any lad's belle, nor any professor's pet. But we extend a vote of thanks to the Year '24 for giving us such a lady as Hazel.

name: Fontaine, Willie
description: Willie is among the best. She never worries, for she laughs and sings in everything.
text: Willie is among the best. She never worries, for she laughs and sings in everything.
